ab: no ka madagdag ya am namen niamlivon si ina.
ch: 今天上午我和媽媽去環島。
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: ya mowgaraw o angit no ya maraw, o kakawan am ya ji arekmeh a ya ji annget, a ya masazowsaw.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: namen mian do Jipanatosan am, namen kanen o mavaw namen, o zezak am ya tomiray do kataotao namen a ya ikehteng.
ch: 我們在雙獅岩吃著點心，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: ya makoyab am, ya mipabazangbang rana o angit.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: ko pacicin si ina am, “ya na ikabazangbang no angit ang?”
ch: 我問媽媽:「為甚麼天空是紅色的。」
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: maniring si ina am “ala ya amian so pagpag a ya mai.”
ch: 媽媽說:「可能是颱風要來了。」
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: ya mahep rana am abo rana o cinalab do angit, ya mitotwaw rana o mata no angit.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: ya namen mangay rana do vahay namen.
namen mian pa do rarahan am, ko patanangen o nakenakem ko do mata no angit.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: inaoy no ji ngai o kakawan, ta ko akzeben pa a kalivon.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再環島。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
